# MCP Hangar

> MCP Hangar is the open-source control plane for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. It sits between AI agents and MCP servers to provide authentication, access control policies, observability, and compliance-grade audit logging. MIT-licensed, self-hosted, sub-millisecond overhead.

## Key facts

- Language: Python (pip install mcp-hangar)
- License: MIT
- Current version: v1.2.2
- Proxy architecture: agents connect to Hangar via MCP, Hangar enforces policies and forwards to upstream MCP servers
- Supports: subprocess, Docker, and remote HTTP MCP server backends
- Zero cloud dependency: runs locally, on bare metal, or in Kubernetes

## Docs

- [Quick Start](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/getting-started/quickstart): Install and make your first parallel call in 2 minutes
- [Installation](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/getting-started/installation): All installation methods (pip, uv, curl)
- [Configuration Reference](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/reference/configuration): YAML config schema for mcp_servers, policies, auth, and export
- [Architecture](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/architecture): How the proxy, policy engine, and event system work together
- [Cookbook](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/cookbook): 13 production recipes from zero to production

## Features

- [Access Control](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/access-control): Per-caller, per-server, per-tool RBAC policies
- [Tool Filtering](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/tool-filtering): Allow/deny tools by glob pattern
- [Observability](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/observability): OpenTelemetry traces, Prometheus metrics, correlation IDs
- [Compliance Export](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/compliance-export): JSONL, CEF, LEEF, Syslog exporters for SIEM integration
- [Circuit Breaker](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/circuit-breaker): Automatic isolation of failing servers
- [Digest Pinning](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/digest-pinning): SHA-256 tool schema integrity verification
- [Cost Attribution](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/guides/cost-attribution): Per-tool-call cost tracking with Prometheus metrics

## API

- [REST API](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/reference/rest-api): HTTP endpoints for management and monitoring
- [CLI Reference](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/reference/cli): Command-line interface documentation
- [MCP Tools](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/reference/mcp-tools): Built-in MCP tools exposed by Hangar

## Optional

- [Contributing Guide](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/development/CONTRIBUTING): How to contribute to MCP Hangar
- [ADR Index](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/adr): Architecture Decision Records
- [Changelog](https://mcp-hangar.io/docs/changelog): Version history and release notes
- [Blog](https://mcp-hangar.io/blog): Engineering updates and deep-dives
